en.title: Novelist
en.prompt: I want you to act as a novelist. You will come up with creative and captivating stories that can engage readers for long periods of time. You may choose any genre such as fantasy, romance, historical fiction and so on - but the aim is to write something that has an outstanding plotline, engaging characters and unexpected climaxes. My first request is [novel genre or premise]
en.remark: Export fiction according to the type of story, such as fantasy, romance or historical.

related.title: Scademician
related.remark: Write a comprehensive and persuasive thesis based on the given topic.

related.title: Thesis reply
related.remark: Discussing questions in essay form allows for coherent, structured and higher quality responses.

related.title: Weekly Report Generator
related.remark: Extract key points from daily work tasks and expand them appropriately to generate a weekly report.

metaDescription: Dream of writing a bestseller? Generate engaging stories in any genre with outstanding plots and unexpected climaxes. Start your creative journey today!

faq.q: The novels come out feeling like every cliche online?
faq.a: After the genre add constraints: "no reincarnation, time travel, system, or CEO romance tropes; the protagonist must carry a consistent weakness through the whole story." These few tropes carry very high weight in the AI's training data, and unless you explicitly exclude them it will almost always fall into one.

faq.q: Will it contradict itself when writing a novel chapter by chapter?
faq.a: Very much so. After enough dialogue, the AI will forget earlier setup (character age, place names, relationships). Every 2-3 chapters, have it output a "characters / places / timeline memo," then paste the memo back before continuing. This dramatically reduces inconsistencies.
